meaning: [地]adj.(地层、岩组等)覆盖基底岩石的,上地壳的
examples: The quartz-mica schist together with paragneiss constituted the old supracrustal series.
There is a lot of supracrustal enclaves in the Mesoarchean Tiejiashan granite in the Anshan area, Liaoning Province.
The Kongling Complex consists of basement rocks, supracrustal rocks and some mafic rocks occurring as lenses, boudins or layers.
